subcodes.title: Words to Breakwell, Hopper, Brittingham, spoken around 1901-09-04
subcodes.first_line: Once it was said that the plant had a spirit and the spirit of the plant is the name which was given to it... They are simply the results of the combination of the elements, and when they die nothing remains of them.
subcodes.subjects: @power of the mind over nature, @man's distinction from the animal, @degrees of spirit and the kingdoms of existence, @the human soul
